divergences.description: user-auth appears in FEATURES.json with happy_path and integration true; CONTRACT explicitly lists authentication as out of scope.
network-sync appears in FEATURES.json with happy_path true; CONTRACT explicitly lists network sync as out of scope.
delete-task and complete-task have happy_path=false while out-of-scope work has advanced — in-scope work deprioritized in favor of CONTRACT violations.

summary: Two CONTRACT scope exclusions (auth, network sync) are actively tracked in FEATURES.json with lifecycle progress, while two contracted features (delete-task, complete-task) have stalled at happy_path=false. Implementation has substantially departed from commitments.
